name_en: M14231 White Flower Cherry Blossom 🍒 (M46279). This Pochette Metis East West handbag is from the Takashi Murakami Reproduction series, dyeing the Monogram coated canvas in soft new-season tones that complement the artist's sweet cherry pattern. A glossy S-lock buckle brightens the overall design, and the compact structure features multiple compartments, making it an elegant choice for daily travel. Dimensions: 21.5*6*13.5cm. (Excludes doll)
